Volcanoes, Rainforest & Wildlife

Signature Tours

Our most loved experiences — designed by locals, guided by experts.

Volcano
From
$95 / pp
Duration Full Day
01

Arenal Volcano Adventure

La Fortuna · Alajuela

Hike the legendary Arenal Volcano trails, soak in natural hot springs and witness breathtaking views of Costa Rica's most iconic volcano. One of the most memorable experiences in Costa Rica.

Full Day · 8-10 hrs
Max 12 people

What's Included

  • 1968 Lava Trail guided hike
  • Natural hot springs soak
  • Traditional Costa Rican lunch
  • Hotel pickup in La Fortuna area
Volcano
From
$110 / pp
Duration Full Day
02

Miravalles Volcano & Hot Springs

Guanacaste Province

Explore the lesser-known but equally stunning Miravalles Volcano. Experience geothermal wonders, therapeutic mud baths and thermal rivers in a truly authentic Costa Rican setting.

Full Day · 8 hrs
Max 12 people

What's Included

  • Geothermal activity tour
  • Therapeutic mud baths
  • Natural thermal river
  • Local Guanacaste cuisine lunch
Rainforest
From
$125 / pp
Duration Full Day
03

Rio Celeste Tour

Tenorio National Park

Discover the mystical turquoise river of Tenorio National Park. Hike through pristine rainforest to reach the iconic waterfall — one of the most photographed spots in Costa Rica.

Full Day · 9 hrs
Max 10 people

What's Included

  • Guided rainforest hike
  • The famous blue waterfall
  • Blue lagoon viewpoint
  • Wildlife spotting (sloths, monkeys)
Nature
From
$75 / pp
Duration Half Day
04

Rainforest Trails & Hanging Bridges

Monteverde Cloud Forest

Walk above the rainforest canopy on suspended bridges. Spot toucans, sloths and monkeys in their natural habitat with a certified naturalist guide who knows every trail by heart.

Half Day · 4-5 hrs
Max 12 people

What's Included

  • 6 hanging bridges experience
  • Canopy-level wildlife viewing
  • Professional naturalist guide
  • Best photography stops
The Venegas Promise

Every Tour Includes

No hidden fees, no tourist traps. Just authentic Costa Rica experiences with certified local guides.

Hotel Pickup Round-trip included
Small Groups Max 12 per tour
ICT Certified Fully insured
Free Cancellation No deposit required
Pacific Coast Paradise

Costa Rica's Top 5 Beaches

Golden sand, turquoise waters and endless paradise on the Pacific coast.

Most Photogenic

Playa Conchal

A unique beach made entirely of tiny crushed shells. Crystal-clear waters perfect for snorkeling.

Luxury

Playa Flamingo

Upscale beach with pink-hued sand, luxury marinas and world-class sportfishing.

Surfer's Paradise

Playa Tamarindo

Vibrant surf town with endless waves, beachfront restaurants and legendary sunsets.

Eco-Friendly

Playa Grande

Pristine, protected beach where leatherback sea turtles nest. Unspoiled natural beauty.

Family Favorite

Playa Las Catalinas

A charming beachfront village with calm waters, ideal for families and romantic escapes.

Top-Rated Experiences

Unforgettable Experiences

Turn your vacation into memories that last a lifetime.

3 hours

Sunset Sailing Tour

Sail the Pacific coast while witnessing Costa Rica's world-famous sunsets. Tropical drinks and snacks included.

from $85/pp
4 hours

Romantic Dinner Cruise

Candlelit gourmet dinner aboard a private yacht. Live music, premium drinks and unforgettable ocean views.

from $145/pp
6 hours

Catamaran Full Day

Sail to hidden beaches, snorkel with tropical fish, enjoy gourmet lunch and open bar — all day luxury at sea.

from $135/pp
🌴 About Us

Born in Costa Rica, Sharing Pura Vida with the World

Venegas Costa Rica Tours is a family-owned business founded in 2010 with one mission: to share the magic of our home country with travelers from all over the world.

Our local guides are born and raised in Costa Rica — they know every hidden waterfall, the best spots to watch the sunset, and the secret trails where wildlife thrives. Every tour is an authentic experience, not a tourist trap.

15+ Years Guiding
10,000+ Happy Guests
100% Local Guides
4.9 TripAdvisor

The Venegas Difference

Local Guides

Born and raised in Costa Rica. They know every trail, story and hidden gem.

Small Groups

Maximum 12 guests per tour. More personal attention, better experiences.

All-Inclusive

Transport, meals, equipment and park fees — no hidden costs, no surprises.

Safe & Certified

ICT certified, fully insured, safety-first operation. Your wellbeing is our priority.

4.9 Rating · 2,500+ Reviews

What Our Travelers Say

"The most incredible trip of our lives! Our guide Carlos knew everything about the wildlife and we saw sloths, toucans and a volcano — all in one day. Venegas made Costa Rica unforgettable."

J
Jennifer M. Austin, TX · Arenal Volcano + Rio Celeste

"The sunset cruise was magical. The catamaran day was even better. Food was delicious, drinks flowing, and the crew was amazing. Best part of our honeymoon!"

D
David & Sarah K. New York, NY · Sunset Sailing + Catamaran

"Authentic Costa Rica experience. Not touristy at all. The mud baths and hot springs were otherworldly. Highly recommend Venegas for a real local adventure."

M
Michael R. Chicago, IL · Miravalles Volcano Tour
